title: Manchester MPs Campaign for Local Government Support – JEFF SMITH MP
meta_description: I have joined other Manchester MPs in writing to the Secretary of State for Housing, Communities and Local Government, to ask that the Government delivers a fair and substantial uplift in funding for Manchester City Council as part of the upcoming Local Government Finance Settlement.
headings: h2: WORKING HARD FOR MANCHESTER WITHINGTON
h3: Leave a comment Cancel reply
text_excerpt: Manchester MPs Campaign for Local Government Support – JEFF SMITH MP JEFF SMITH MP WORKING HARD FOR MANCHESTER WITHINGTON Menu Skip to content Home About Parliament PMQs & Parliamentary Tours Drug Law Reform Mental Health Environment Policies Assisted Dying Bill Israel, Palestine & Lebanon Help & Advice Cost of Living Crisis Cost of Living Crisis Energy Support Debt Advice Mortgage repayments Emergency Support Finances, Social Security & Employment Housing Immigration & Asylum Local Councillors Contact Privacy Policy Your Local Election Candidates for May 2026 Cllr Suzannah Reeves – Old Moat Ward Ben Williams – Didsbury West Ward Cllr Joanna Midgley – Chorlton Park Ward Cllr John Hacking – Chorlton Ward Cllr Andrew Simcock – Didsbury East Ward Cllr Angela Gartside – Withington Ward December 10, 2025 jeffsmithmp Manchester MPs Campaign for Local Government Support I have joined other Manchester MPs in writing to the Secretary of State for Housing, Communities and Local Government, to ask that the Government delivers a fair and substantial uplift in funding for Manchester City Council as part of the upcoming Local Government Finance Settlement.
